compliance-assessment.desc: Regulatory and standards compliance assessment — GDPR, SOX, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, ISO 27001, NIST CSF. [EXPLICIT]

compliance-framework.desc: Compliance framework design — control libraries, policies, and evidence patterns (SOC2, ISO 27001, GDPR). [EXPLICIT]

contract-review.desc: Contract and clause review — terms analysis, risk clauses, negotiation points, renewal strategy. [EXPLICIT]
